hooks.command:
echo 'Post-compaction reminders:
- voice.regions[0] is sequencing source of truth, voice.pattern is derived
- Human edits (pattern-primitives) do NOT push undo snapshots
- Disabled triggers use velocity=0 sentinel
- Always run: npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run'

hooks.prompt: Were any .ts or .tsx files edited or created in this session? Reply with ONLY raw JSON, no markdown, no explanation. If yes: {"ok":false,"reason":"Run npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run before finishing."} If no: {"ok":true}
